modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst in response to an email and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be distracting grammar usage and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble connecting DYMO LabelWriter to multiple Windows 10 computers.

full_description_text: The user is experiencing issues with their DYMO LabelWriter on two separate Windows 10 machines. The label printer application fails to open correctly, leading to the suspicion that a reinstallation may be necessary.
short_description: Trouble connecting DYMO LabelWriter to multiple Windows 10 computers.
description: The user is experiencing issues with their DYMO LabelWriter on two separate Windows 10 machines. The label printer application fails to open correctly, leading to the suspicion that a reinstallation may be necessary.
